Package com.example.eventlottery

package com.example.eventlottery
  • Class
    Description
    AdminEventControlScreenActivity
    Admin view: list all events from Firestore, search by title (in-memory).
    AdminEventControlScreenAdapter
    Adapter for AdminEventControlScreenActivity event list.
    DeviceIdManager
     
    Entrant
    Model for an entrant (user) profile.
    EntrantHistoryScreenActivity
    Entrant history: events this user has joined (has waitingList doc).
    EntrantHistoryScreenAdapter
    Adapter for EntrantHistoryScreenActivity: events user has joined, with status.
    EntrantMainScreenActivity
    Entrant home: lists all events from Firestore, shows pending/accepted counts for current user.
    EntrantMainScreenAdapter
    Adapter for event list on EntrantMainScreenActivity.
    EntrantProfileActivity
     
    EntrantProfileIntentTest
    Purpose: UI/Intent test to verify that an entrant can successfully enter their personal information and submit the form.
    EntrantSetupActivity
     
    Event
    Model for an event in the Event Lottery system.
    EventDetailsActivity
    Event details and join/leave waiting list (US 01.01.01, 01.01.02, 01.06.02).
    EventEditActivity
    Create/edit event screen (US 02.01.01, 02.01.04).
    EventRepository
     
    ExampleInstrumentedTest
    Instrumented test, which will execute on an Android device.
    ExampleUnitTest
    Example local unit test, which will execute on the development machine (host).
    GeolocationFragment
     
    InvitationInitialFragment
     
    InvitationResponseFragment
     
    LotteryDraw
     
    MainActivity
     
    Organizer
    Model for an organizer account.
    OrganizerDashboardFragment
    Organizer dashboard: lists events where organizerId == deviceId.
    OrganizerEventAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for organizer dashboard event cards.
    OrganizerEventAdapter.EventCardViewHolder
     
    OrganizerEventAdapter.OnEventActionListener
     
    OrganizerNavigationFragment
     
    OrganizerProfileActivity
    Edit organizer profile (firstName, lastName, email, phone) in Firestore organizers/{deviceId}.
    OrganizerSetupActivity
     
    QRCodeActivity
    Shows event QR code and editable promo code (US 02.01.01).
    QRCodeService
    Generates QR code bitmaps and human-readable promo codes for events.
    QRCodeServiceTest
     
    SelectedEntryAdapter
     
    SelectedEntryAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
     
    SelectedList
     
    WaitingEntryAdapter
     
    WaitingListEntry
    Model for one entrant's place on an event waiting list.
    WaitingListEntry.Status
    Lifecycle status of the entrant's application.
    WaitingListFragment
     
    WelcomePageActivity
